name: Stock Quote
description: Get the current price and key metrics for any US or Israeli (.TA) stock — price, change, market cap, P/E ratio, 52-week range, volume, EPS, dividend yield, beta.
exampleQuery: What's the current price of Microsoft?

sampleResponse.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) is trading at $425.50, up 1.2% today.
insights: MSFT is trading near the middle of its 52-week range.
